restatement.goal: 把 Codex `/plan`、`tools/qf plan`、`tools/qf discuss/execute` 的职责边界写清楚，
restatement.scope: AGENTS.md, docs/WORKFLOW.md, docs/CODEX_CLI_OPERATION.md, docs/PROJECT_GUIDE.md, TASKS/QUEUE.md, TASKS/STATE.md, reports/{RUN_ID}/
restatement.acceptance: 文档明确区分：Codex /plan（讨论协议）与 tools/qf plan（队列提案工具）; 文档明确 Plan -> Confirm -> Execute 的触发点与执行边界; 文档明确 /compact 不是每 task 强制，而是按上下文体量与里程碑触发; Command(s) pass: make verify; Evidence updated: reports/{RUN_ID}/summary.md and reports/{RUN_ID}/decision.md
restatement.stop_condition: finish and wait for next instruction; if blocked, record stop reason in decision.md

understanding.project_summary: quant-factory-os is the governance/execution base for quant engineering.
understanding.project_goal: quant-factory-os is an evidence-driven operating system for quant engineering.
understanding.constitution_interpretation: 约束是任务驱动、证据优先、scope 严格、文档新鲜度硬门禁。
understanding.workflow_interpretation: 流程以门禁推进：sync 同频 -> ready 上岗 -> orient/choose 定方向 -> council/arbiter 收敛 -> slice 拆解 -> do 执行 -> verify/review/ship 收尾。
